subject: Re:
body: I think it's a little bit too early. Probably once (and IF) we'll start getting deeper into a sincere peace process.
body_html: <html><head><meta http-equiv="content-type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8"></head><body dir="auto"><div>I think it's a little bit too early. Probably once (and IF) we'll start getting deeper into a sincere peace process.
